phase-plan.purpose: Define a safe entitlement boundary for ChatGPT-linked access while keeping credentials and enforcement server-side.
phase-plan.scope: Server-side entitlement checks, mode strategy (`observe` then `enforce`), degraded-path behavior, and audit expectations. Out of scope: billing provider implementation details.

decision.summary: Entitlement checks are evaluated on server paths only; client receives capability states, never billing truth source.
decision.impact: Prevents key leakage and avoids trust on client-provided entitlement claims.

suggestion.gap: REQUIREMENTS.xml does not define explicit entitlement states and fallback behavior for AI-gated routes.
suggestion.proposal: Add a requirement for canonical entitlement states (`eligible`, `ineligible`, `unknown`, `degraded`) and mandatory degraded-mode UX/API behavior.
